name: Night Stalker: The Hunt for a Serial Killer
original_name: Night Stalker: The Hunt for a Serial Killer
overview: Beneath the sunlit glamour of 1985 L.A. lurks a relentlessly evil serial killer. In this true-crime story, two detectives won't rest until they catch him.
